# PlayersB

> PlayersB is a football intelligence site focused on player profiles, comparisons, fantasy tools, fixtures, standings, and historical archives.

## Primary URLs
- Home: https://playersb.com/
- Players index: https://playersb.com/players/
- Compare tool: https://playersb.com/compare/
- Fantasy: https://playersb.com/fantasy/
- Matches: https://playersb.com/matches/
- Standings: https://playersb.com/standings/
- Archive: https://playersb.com/archive/
- Learn: https://playersb.com/learn/
- Glossary: https://playersb.com/glossary/

## Machine-readable discovery
- Sitemap: https://playersb.com/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://playersb.com/feed.xml

## Data freshness
- Core football datasets are refreshed by automation every ~6 hours.
- Matches/Standings/Fantasy pages display "Last updated" values from generated data files.

## Data sources
- Football-Data.org (fixtures, standings, scorers)
- OpenFootball + StatsBomb open-data (archive/historical coverage)
- Local fallback seeds for resiliency when free sources are unavailable

## Notes
- Content is educational and analytical.
- No betting recommendations or sportsbook operations.
